# Output Format Reference

The generated README should follow this format:

## Sections

- Top heading: `# Maven Artifact`
- One section per form directory:
  - `## <Artifact name>`
- Under each componet:
  - one bullet per criteria:
    - `Group id`
    - `Artifact id`
    - `Version`
    - `Artifact type`: maven-import, maven-dropins or maven-dependency
    - One code section for maven dependcy sample
